subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of the Blessed Beauty! The sweetness of the love of God was so delectable to thy taste that it stirred a fervor in thy heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز جمال مبارک حلاوت محبت الله در مذاقت لذیذ بود که در دلت شوری افکند
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
